/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/core/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/core/CommandParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/core/PuzzleEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/terminal/CommandPrompt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/terminal/Typing.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/terminal/Dropdwn.cpp.o -o main  _deps/raylib-build/raylib/libraylib.a -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation
